message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.value_counts (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.value_counts default
behavior (sort=True descending, dropna=True):

- value_counts_basic (strings, ties resolved deterministically)
- value_counts_integers (numeric values)
- value_counts_drops_nulls (verifies dropna=True default)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
sorted Series, runs the Rust implementation, and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesValueCounts was already wired in
FixtureOperation; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-8mhs3]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
